title: astragalus stridii
intro: Astragalus stridii, also known as the desert milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus stridii include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus stridii is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defenses.
